instruction:
A tree is supported by a wire anchored in the ground 13 feet from its base. The wire is 4 feet longer than the height that it reaches on the tree. How long is the wire? a) Use the Pythagorean theorem to write a polynomial equation to solve to answer the question. Use the variable $x$ to represent the length of the wire. Answer: [ANS]
b) Solve the equation and give the length of the wire. Answer: [ANS] feet
